canonical_definition: UltraFeedback-Binarized (UF-B), a paired preference dataset derived from GPT-4 scored completions, where the highest-scoring response is labeled as chosen and another as rejected.
papers: Direct Density Ratio Optimization: A Statistically Consistent Approach to Aligning Large Language Models
ROPO: Robust Preference Optimization for Large Language Models

definitions.text: UltraFeedback-Binarized (UF-B), a paired preference dataset derived from GPT-4 scored completions, where the highest-scoring response is labeled as chosen and another as rejected.
definitions.paper: Direct Density Ratio Optimization: A Statistically Consistent Approach to Aligning Large Language Models

definitions.text: A widely-used dataset for preference alignment consisting of binarized preference pairs for dialogue tasks.
definitions.paper: ROPO: Robust Preference Optimization for Large Language Models
